apiKey.description: Resend API key. Falls back to RESEND_API_KEY when unset.

contentId.description: Content ID for inline attachments (e.g., for embedding images in HTML).

contentType.description: The MIME type of the attachment.

path.description: URL path to fetch the attachment content from.

bcc.description: List of BCC recipient email addresses.

cc.description: List of CC recipient email addresses.

from.description: The sender email address. Must be a verified domain.

headers.description: Custom email headers as key-value pairs.

html.description: The HTML body of the email.

scheduledAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to schedule the email for future delivery.

tags.description: List of tags for categorizing the email.

template.description: The template ID to use for the email body.

text.description: The plain text body of the email.

id.description: The unique identifier for the sent email.

resend:resources:AutomationConnection.description: A connection (edge) between steps in a Resend automation workflow.

from.description: The key of the source step.

to.description: The key of the destination step.

type.description: The connection type: default, condition_met, condition_not_met, timeout, or event_received. Defaults to 'default'.

resend:resources:AutomationStep.description: A step in a Resend automation workflow.

config.description: Configuration object for the step. Structure depends on the step type.

key.description: Unique identifier for this step within the automation. Used to reference the step in connections.

type.description: The type of step: trigger, send_email, delay, wait_for_event, condition, contact_update, contact_delete, or add_to_segment.

resend:resources:DnsRecord.description: A DNS record required to verify or operate a Resend domain.

priority.description: The MX priority for records that require one.

record.description: The Resend record purpose, such as SPF, DKIM, Receiving, Tracking, or TrackingCAA.

status.description: The verification status of the DNS record.

type.description: The DNS record type, such as TXT, MX, CNAME, or CAA.

fallbackValue.description: Optional fallback value used when no value is supplied.

type.description: The template variable type, such as string, number, boolean, object, or list.

apiKey.description: Resend API key. Falls back to RESEND_API_KEY when unset.
Resend API key. Falls back to RESEND_API_KEY when unset.

resend:index:ApiKey.description: A Resend API key. API key changes are replaced because Resend does not support updates.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the API key was created.

domainId.description: Optional domain ID that restricts this API key to a single domain.

lastUsedAt.description: Timestamp when the API key was last used, if any.

name.description: Display name for the API key.

permission.description: API key permission: full_access or sending_access.

token.description: Secret API key token returned only when the key is created.

domainId.description: Optional domain ID that restricts this API key to a single domain.

name.description: Display name for the API key.

permission.description: API key permission: full_access or sending_access.

resend:index:Automation.description: A Resend automation for email automation workflows. Automations allow you to create multi-step email sequences triggered by events.

connections.description: The connections (edges) between steps defining the workflow graph.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the automation was created.

status.description: The automation status: 'enabled' or 'disabled'. Defaults to 'disabled'.

steps.description: The steps in the automation workflow. Must contain 1-150 steps, including at least one trigger step.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the automation was last updated.

connections.description: The connections (edges) between steps defining the workflow graph.

status.description: The automation status: 'enabled' or 'disabled'. Defaults to 'disabled'.

steps.description: The steps in the automation workflow. Must contain 1-150 steps, including at least one trigger step.

resend:index:ContactProperty.description: A Resend contact property for defining custom fields on contacts. Contact properties allow you to store additional data about your contacts.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the contact property was created.

fallbackValue.description: Optional fallback value used when the property is not set on a contact.

key.description: The key of the contact property. Must be alphanumeric with underscores only, maximum 50 characters. This field is immutable after creation.

type.description: The type of the contact property: string or number. This field is immutable after creation.

fallbackValue.description: Optional fallback value used when the property is not set on a contact.

key.description: The key of the contact property. Must be alphanumeric with underscores only, maximum 50 characters. This field is immutable after creation.

type.description: The type of the contact property: string or number. This field is immutable after creation.

resend:index:Domain.description: A Resend sending domain with DNS records for verification and routing.

capabilities.description: Enabled domain capabilities. Supported values are sending and receiving.

clickTracking.description: Whether Resend should track link clicks for this domain.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the domain was created in Resend.

customReturnPath.description: Optional custom return-path subdomain for bounce handling.

name.description: The domain name to manage in Resend.

openTracking.description: Whether Resend should track email opens for this domain.

records.description: DNS records Resend requires for domain verification and operation.

region.description: The Resend sending region for the domain, such as us-east-1, eu-west-1, sa-east-1, or ap-northeast-1.

status.description: The current Resend verification status for the domain.

tls.description: TLS mode for email delivery: opportunistic or enforced.

trackingSubdomain.description: Optional subdomain to use for click and open tracking.

capabilities.description: Enabled domain capabilities. Supported values are sending and receiving.

clickTracking.description: Whether Resend should track link clicks for this domain.

customReturnPath.description: Optional custom return-path subdomain for bounce handling.

name.description: The domain name to manage in Resend.

openTracking.description: Whether Resend should track email opens for this domain.

region.description: The Resend sending region for the domain, such as us-east-1, eu-west-1, sa-east-1, or ap-northeast-1.

tls.description: TLS mode for email delivery: opportunistic or enforced.

trackingSubdomain.description: Optional subdomain to use for click and open tracking.

resend:index:DomainVerification.description: A Resend domain verification trigger that waits for DNS verification to complete.

domainId.description: The Resend domain ID to verify.

status.description: The current Resend verification status for the domain.

domainId.description: The Resend domain ID to verify.

resend:index:Event.description: A Resend event for defining custom event types that trigger automations. Events allow you to send behavioral data about contacts to trigger automated email sequences.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the event was created.

name.description: The name of the event. Must not start with 'resend:' (reserved prefix). This field is immutable after creation.

schema.description: Optional schema defining the event payload structure. Maps field names to types: string, number, boolean, or date.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the event was last updated.

name.description: The name of the event. Must not start with 'resend:' (reserved prefix). This field is immutable after creation.

schema.description: Optional schema defining the event payload structure. Maps field names to types: string, number, boolean, or date.

resend:index:Segment.description: A Resend segment for contact segmentation. Segments allow you to group contacts based on filter criteria for targeted broadcasts. Note: Segments are immutable after creation - any changes require replacement.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the segment was created.

filter.description: Optional filter criteria for the segment. This is an opaque object as the API doesn't fully document the schema. This field is immutable after creation.

name.description: The name of the segment. This field is immutable after creation.

filter.description: Optional filter criteria for the segment. This is an opaque object as the API doesn't fully document the schema. This field is immutable after creation.

name.description: The name of the segment. This field is immutable after creation.

resend:index:Template.description: A Resend email template with HTML, optional defaults, and template variables.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the template was created.

from.description: Optional default sender for emails sent with the template.

html.description: The HTML body for the template.

replyTo.description: Optional default reply-to addresses for emails sent with the template.

subject.description: Optional default subject for emails sent with the template.

text.description: Optional plain text body for the template.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the template was last updated.

from.description: Optional default sender for emails sent with the template.

html.description: The HTML body for the template.

replyTo.description: Optional default reply-to addresses for emails sent with the template.

subject.description: Optional default subject for emails sent with the template.

text.description: Optional plain text body for the template.

resend:index:Topic.description: A Resend topic for managing subscription preferences. Topics allow contacts to control which types of emails they receive.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the topic was created.

defaultSubscription.description: The default subscription behavior for new contacts: opt_in (contacts must opt in) or opt_out (contacts are subscribed by default).

description.description: An optional description of the topic. Maximum 200 characters.

name.description: The name of the topic. Maximum 50 characters.

visibility.description: Topic visibility: public (visible in preference center) or private (hidden from preference center).

defaultSubscription.description: The default subscription behavior for new contacts: opt_in (contacts must opt in) or opt_out (contacts are subscribed by default).

description.description: An optional description of the topic. Maximum 200 characters.

name.description: The name of the topic. Maximum 50 characters.

visibility.description: Topic visibility: public (visible in preference center) or private (hidden from preference center).

resend:index:Webhook.description: A Resend webhook endpoint that receives event notifications.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the webhook was created.

endpoint.description: The HTTPS URL that Resend will send webhook events to.

events.description: List of event types to subscribe to. Valid events include email.sent, email.delivered, email.bounced, email.complained, email.opened, email.clicked, email.failed, email.delivery_delayed, email.scheduled, email.received, email.suppressed, domain.created, domain.updated, domain.deleted, contact.created, contact.updated, and contact.deleted.

endpoint.description: The HTTPS URL that Resend will send webhook events to.

events.description: List of event types to subscribe to. Valid events include email.sent, email.delivered, email.bounced, email.complained, email.opened, email.clicked, email.failed, email.delivery_delayed, email.scheduled, email.received, email.suppressed, domain.created, domain.updated, domain.deleted, contact.created, contact.updated, and contact.deleted.

resend:index:sendBatchEmail.description: Send a batch of up to 100 emails in a single API call using the Resend API. Returns an array of email IDs.

data.description: Array of results, each containing the ID of a sent email.

resend:index:sendBroadcast.description: Create and send a broadcast email to a segment via the Resend API. This combines broadcast creation and sending into a single atomic operation using the send: true flag.

from.description: The sender email address. Must be a verified domain.

html.description: The HTML body of the broadcast email.

name.description: An optional name for the broadcast (for internal reference).

previewText.description: Preview text shown in email clients before opening the email.

scheduledAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to schedule the broadcast for future delivery. Omit for immediate send.

segmentId.description: The ID of the segment to send the broadcast to.

subject.description: The email subject line for the broadcast.

text.description: The plain text body of the broadcast email.

broadcastId.description: The unique identifier for the broadcast.

status.description: The status of the broadcast (e.g., 'queued' or 'sent').

resend:index:sendEmail.description: Send an email using the Resend API. This is a stateless function that sends an email and returns the message ID.

bcc.description: List of BCC recipient email addresses.

cc.description: List of CC recipient email addresses.

from.description: The sender email address. Must be a verified domain.

headers.description: Custom email headers as key-value pairs.

html.description: The HTML body of the email.

scheduledAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to schedule the email for future delivery.

tags.description: List of tags for categorizing the email.

template.description: The template ID to use for the email body.

text.description: The plain text body of the email.

emailId.description: The unique identifier for the sent email.

resend:index:sendEvent.description: Trigger a custom event for a contact via the Resend API. Requires exactly one of contactId or email to identify the contact.

contactId.description: The ID of the contact to trigger the event for. Exactly one of contactId or email must be provided.

email.description: The email address of the contact to trigger the event for. Exactly one of contactId or email must be provided.

event.description: The name of the event to trigger (e.g., 'user.created').

payload.description: Optional key-value pairs of event data.

event.description: The name of the triggered event.
